goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should 'leave after 09:45'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'norwich'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should leave after 09:45
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to norwich
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get entrance fee
